title: Côn Đảo Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Côn Đảo with a Z-Score of +3.37. The city is experiencing extremely high temperatures, with a Score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Côn Đảo is causing significant discomfort, with a relative humidity of 79% and wind speed of 27.9 km/h. 
 The Cooling Degree Days (CDD) is at 10.8 GG, indicating a high energy demand for cooling systems. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under immense pressure to cope with this extreme weather condition.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
